_comment: Your prediction ledger. One entry per falsifiable claim you want to track. Start entries as 'open'; later set status + fill 'verification' when the claim resolves. The examples below are synthetic — delete them and add your own.

entries.author: example_handle
entries.claim: Foundry X will reach >50% yield on its 2nm node by Q3

entries.author: example_handle
entries.claim: Vendor Y begins volume shipments of component Z this quarter

verification.evidence: Company press release + two independent trade-press reports corroborated volume shipment start.
